steps: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/ and sign in with your Google account
Create a new project or select an existing one from the project dropdown
Navigate to APIs & Services > Library and enable the 'Custom Search API'
Go to APIs & Services > Credentials at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
Optionally restrict the key to the Custom Search API under 'Edit API key'
Go to https://programmablesearchengine.google.com/controlpanel/create to create a Programmable Search Engine and obtain a Search Engine ID (cx)

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Google Cloud API key, passed as the 'key' query parameter

notes: You also need a Search Engine ID (cx) from https://programmablesearchengine.google.com — this is a per-request parameter, not a credential
Free tier: 100 search queries per day; paid at $5 per 1,000 queries up to 10,000/day
The Custom Search JSON API is closed to new customers as of 2025; existing customers have until Jan 1 2027 — consider Vertex AI Search as an alternative
API key is passed as the 'key' query parameter on each request
Restrict your API key to specific APIs and HTTP referrers to limit exposure

test_endpoint.description: Execute a simple search query (requires a valid cx Search Engine ID)
